rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; EU defense and Iran deal stories have only indirect, fading relevance to a western periphery resident.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: EU defense fragmentation has indirect relevance to Portugal's EU posture, but no immediate impact on daily life for a Portuguese resident.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate keeps mild energy price uncertainty alive in EU markets, with marginal indirect effect on Portuguese cost of living.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight perilous journeys of migrants
top_events.summary: Migration routes through the Atlantic to Iberia remain a background issue; Pope's visit raises awareness but signals no new policy change affecting Portugal directly.
